title: Tandoori Flaky Irish Salmon Roast
description: A fragrant, floral salmon roast with galangal paste and tandoori spices, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Marinate the salmon fillets in yogurt, galangal paste, smoked paprika, cumin, garam masala, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and olive oil for 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 220°C (430°F) with a baking rack set in the middle and an oven-safe pan in the lower rack for drip collection.
Place the marinated fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment, skin side down.
Roast the salmon for 20 minutes or until the flesh flakes easily and the skin is crisp.
Remove the salmon from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the tandoori salmon with a side of roasted potatoes and a drizzle of lemon yogurt sauce.
Optionally garnish with fresh cilantro or parsley for added color.
Enjoy with a glass of chilled Irish stout or a light white wine.
Keep leftovers refrigerated; reheat gently in a skillet to preserve flakiness.
Store in an airtight container for up to 2 days.
